errors.loginFailed: Login failed. Please check your credentials.
errors.apiNotHealthy: API is not online, or incorrect.
errors.refreshMissingTarget: Select a server with a valid URL for this session.

form.loginTypeFromSavedAccount: This login method is fixed for the selected account. Pick “New account” to use the other method.
form.refreshFailedBody: Could not restore this session. Sign in again.
form.apiKeyLockedHint: This saved account already has a stored token. Use Refresh, or unlock to replace the token.

widget.title: Widgets
widget.unavailable: Widget settings are currently unavailable. Please try again later.
widget.installHintBoth: This instance is not set up for widgets yet. An admin can install the required schema and flow.
widget.installHintCollection: The widget config collection is missing. An admin can install it.
widget.installHintFlow: The widget flow is missing. An admin can install it.
widget.permissionWarning: You don't have permission to manage widgets. Ask an admin to grant access to app_widget_config.
widget.intro: Configure which collections native widgets can show.
widget.addToHomeScreenHintAndroid: Tap below to add the Latest Items widget to your home screen. You can then choose which setup to show.
widget.addToHomeScreenHintIos: Long-press the home screen, tap +, choose "Latest Items" for this app, then pick the setup you want.
widget.setupPickerHint: Add at least one setup below so the widget's Setup picker has options. Open this screen before adding the widget so the list is synced.
widget.addConfirmMessage: Confirm on the next screen to place the widget on your home screen.
widget.columnsHint: Columns and values match the collection table view (preset or all fields).

widthBehaviour.label: Width behaviour
widthBehaviour.hint: Fit content (wrap) or a fixed share of the row (%). The main title always uses the remaining space.

width.label: Width (%)
width.hint: Approximate share of the row when behaviour is “Fixed share” (0–100).

left.label: Left
left.hint: Optional short text shown on the left of each row (e.g. status like archived/published, or a small label). Leave empty to hide this column.

title.label: Title
title.hint: The main text displayed in the widget row, typically the title of the item.

subtitle.label: Subtitle
subtitle.hint: Additional text that appears below the title in the widget row, providing more context or information.

right.label: Right
right.hint: Optional short text shown on the right of each row (e.g. time, counters, or a small meta value). Leave empty to hide this column.

latestItems.slotsHint: Supported fields to show in the widget. Each field is optional.

push.title: Push notifications
push.unavailable: Push notifications are not available on this device.
push.setupError: Push notification settings are currently unavailable. Please try again later.
push.installHint: This instance is not set up for push yet. An admin can install the required schema and flow.
push.missingCollectionHint: The push collection is missing. An admin can install it.
push.missingFlowHint: The push flow is missing. An admin can install it.
push.staticApiKeyLabel: Static API key for push flow
push.staticApiKeyHelper: Create a token in Directus (Settings → Access Tokens) with at least Read access to the app_push_devices collection. The push flow uses this token to fetch device tokens when sending notifications.
push.installRolesLabel: Roles that can use push notifications
push.installRolesHelper: A new permission (read, create, update, delete on app_push_devices) will be added to the selected roles.
push.permissionCheckFailedBody: We couldn't verify whether your role can access push settings. If enabling push fails, contact an administrator.
push.permissionWarning: You don't have permission to manage push settings. Ask an admin to grant access to app_push_devices.
push.setUpSubscriptionsHint: Set up which collections you want to receive push notifications for.
push.subscriptionsHint: Choose which collections to subscribe to and when to receive notifications.
push.permissionDeniedBody: Enable notifications for this app in the system settings to receive push notifications.

documentEditor.confirmDelete: Are you sure you want to delete this item?

ota.updateAvailable: A new update is available. Click OK to install.

apiSelect.confirmDelete: Do you really want to delete this api?

localeSwitch.helperText: * unsupported languages only translate your content.

deeplinkLoading.subtitleSwitching: Applying deep link session and reloading your data.
deeplinkLoading.detailMoment: This should only take a moment.
